traceback/walk_stack.name: walk_stack
traceback/walk_stack.description: Walk a stack following f.f_back from the given frame, yielding the frame and line number for each frame. If f is None, the current stack is used. This helper is used with StackSummary.extract(). Added in version 3.5. Changed in version 3.14: This function previously returned a generator that would walk the stack when first iterated over. The generator returned now is the state of the stack when walk_stack is called.

traceback/walk_tb.name: walk_tb
traceback/walk_tb.description: Walk a traceback following tb_next yielding the frame and line number for each frame. This helper is used with StackSummary.extract(). Added in version 3.5.
